history.content: I have a swollen left eyelid that started 3 days ago. It was generalized and red, but now it is localized to a single swollen lump on the upper left eyelid.
Could you tell me more about that?
It is tender to touch and has a constant, low-severity burning pain. It gets worse when I touch it, but hot baths seem to help.
Could you tell me more about that?
I noticed some white pus coming from the lump starting 2 days ago. I do not have any redness in my eye itself, no vision changes, no fever, or chills.
Could you tell me more about that?
I am a 39 year old female. I do not have a history of diabetes, skin conditions, or immune issues. I have not used any new makeup products, and there has been no trauma to the eye.
Could you tell me more about that?
No other symptoms. Just the painful, pus-filled lump on my upper left eyelid.
Could you tell me more about that?
That is all the information I have.
Could you tell me more about that?
I am ready for the diagnosis.
Could you tell me more about that?
